sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: MAC Gas sorted our boiler out same day — quick, clean and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Really professional service from start to finish. Full central heating installation completed on time and on budget.

sample_reviews.author: David R
sample_reviews.text: Called about a gas leak concern and they came out quickly, put my mind at ease and fixed the issue. Great service.

brand.usp: MAC Gas provides reliable, fully Gas Safe registered plumbing, heating and gas services across Birmingham and the West Midlands. We deliver honest, high-quality workmanship at competitive prices with no hidden costs.
brand.about_paragraph: We're MAC Gas, your local Gas Safe registered plumbing, heating and gas specialists based in Birmingham. Whether you need a new boiler, a full central heating installation or an urgent plumbing repair, we bring the same level of care and professionalism to every job. We pride ourselves on turning up on time, being upfront about costs, and leaving your home as we found it.
